name: Lem Davis
abstract: Lemuel A. Davis (22 June 1914 – 16 January 1970), was an American jazz musician, an alto saxophonist associated with swing music.

concerts.label: All-Star Jazz Concert and Recording Session

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: So Lem Davis and I took him to our tailor who was Leeds Tailors in Manhattan. We picked out the materials, told him how to cut it and at that time the one piece back was fashionable, you know. And we dressed him up and boy he looked like someone else.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: Eddie was in there at the time, with that great group he had with Lem Davis and John Simmons and Emmett Berry

about_quotes.speaker: Vic Dickenson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I recorded it once, oh, with Lem Davis years ago.
